feed.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

entry.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks W17A07 - W17A04 - W17A03 - W17A02 - W17A01 Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 16, 06:00 - 10:00 UTC

Jun 11, 16:38 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer.

List of affected racks:

- Rack W17A07
- Rack W17A04
- Rack W17A03
- Rack W17A02
- Rack W17A01

Start time : 16/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : All servers will be unavailable during maintenance.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA2][Infrastructure] - Rack G263B14 Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 30, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

Jun 11, 16:43 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure in Rack G263B14.

Start time : 30/06/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 30/06/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : Customers could experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case of their servers.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks L104A15/18 and L104B03/08/09 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 25, 20:00 UTC  -  Jun 26, 04:00 UTC

Jun 4, 13:28 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on servers located in the racks L104A15/A18 and L104B03/B08/B09.

Start time : 25/06/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 26/06/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified rack will be temporarily unavailable for up to 8 hours during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be moving servers in the specified racks from L104A15/A18 and L104B03/B08/B09 to L104B02/B06.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [BHS7][Dedicated Servers] - Rack B715A05 Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jun 15, 00:00 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 14/06/2026 23:48 UTC
End time : 14/06/2026 23:59 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 14, 23:57 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in Rack B715A05.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 14/06/2026 23:48 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in Rack B715A05 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [LIM3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack LIM0308C01A Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jun 13, 16:17 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 13/06/2026 13:16 UTC
End time : 13/06/2026 16:13 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 13, 14:27 UTC
Identified - We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer in Rack LIM0308C01A.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 13/06/2026 13:16 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in Rack LIM0308C01A are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Most servers are operational again, but some customers are still temporarily unable to access their servers located in the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 13, 13:22 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the Rack LIM0308C01A.

Start time : 13/06/2026 13:16 UTC

Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located in the specified rack
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [RBX8][Dedicated Servers] - Racks R803R07/08/09 incident notification
entry.content:
Jun 13, 04:32 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 13/06/2026 03:20 UTC
End time : 13/06/2026 04:24 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 13, 03:45 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Rack R803R09 is available again.

A large number of servers in racks R803R07 and R803R08 are also available again.

Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 13, 03:31 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific racks R803R07, R803R08 and R803R09.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 13/06/2026 03:20 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the specified rack are no longer able to access the public and vRack networks.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers via public and vRack networks located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Update : All servers in racks G108B03 and G108B04 are operational, and there are still some servers remaining in G108B02.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are working to fix the remaining servers.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 12, 09:09 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : A significant number of servers are operational.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 12, 04:03 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific racks.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 12/06/2026 03:39 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the racks G108B04, G108B03 and G108B02 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified racks.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [SBG5][Dedicated Servers] - Rack SBG0506A09D incident notification
entry.content:
Jun 12, 12:28 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific Rack SBG0506A09D, that is now resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 12/06/2026 10:20 UTC
End time : 12/06/2026 10:47 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the specified rack were no longer able to access the public network.
Customers Impact : Customers was temporarily unable to access their servers via public network located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [US-EAST-LZ-ATL][Virtual Private Servers] - VPS incident notification
entry.content:
Jun 12, 11:14 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Virtual Private Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the US-EAST-LZ-ATL region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 09/06/2026 11:15 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some Virtual Private Servers are currently experiencing capacity constraints, which may result in intermittent service disruptions.
Customers Impact : Customers may experience failed requests and service errors when attempting to purchase or provision Virtual Private Servers instances in the US-EAST-LZ-ATL region.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA4][Cooling System] - Rack GRA0403E01A maintenance notification
entry.content:
Jun 12, 10:15 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 12, 08:38 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 12, 08:36 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure in rack GRA0403E01A.

Start time : 12/06/2026 08:30 UTC
End time : 12/06/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [BHS4][Dedicated Servers] - Rack T02B69 incident notification

Start time : 12/06/2026 02:37 UTC
End time : 12/06/2026 02:40 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the specified rack were temporarily unable to access the public network.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access their servers via public network located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

Our teams are currently working on the last impacted servers of rack T04C32.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 11, 17:09 UTC

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 11/06/2026 16:45 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the specified racks are no longer available.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified racks.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

entry.title: [GRA2][Cooling System] - Rack G263B02 Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
Jun 10, 17:55 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 10, 07:10 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 10, 07:09 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure in Rack G263B02.

Start time : 10/06/2026 07:10 UTC
End time : 10/06/2026 14:00 UTC

Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

Jun 10, 06:49 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure in Rack SBG0502A08B.

Start time : 10/06/2026 06:50 UTC
End time : 10/06/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : The cooling system's efficiency could be temporarily impacted for some servers, which could cause a decreased performance during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [EU/CA][Virtual Private Servers] - Instances operating system maintenance notification
entry.content:
Jun 10, 14:02 UTC
Completed - The current maintenance has been canceled and she will be rescheduled later.

Jun 10, 14:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 5, 12:44 UTC
Update - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our Virtual Private Servers offer for the EU and CA regions.

Start time : 10/06/2026 14:00 UTC
End time : 10/06/2026 16:00 UTC
Service impact : The operating systems Ubuntu 25.04 and Fedora 42 are end-of-life.
Customers who have already installed one of these operating systems may continue to use it, but will no longer be able to reinstall it.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, starting from June 1st, customers will no longer be able to install end-of-life operating systems.
We encourage customers using these operating systems to migrate to supported versions such as Ubuntu 26.04 or Fedora 44, or a later version.

You can find the information at the following links:
https://github.com/ovh/public-cloud-roadmap/issues/1144
https://github.com/ovh/public-cloud-roadmap/issues/1158

Thank you for your understanding.

May 28, 12:07 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our Virtual Private Servers offer for the EU and CA regions.

Start time : 10/06/2026 14:00 UTC
End time : 10/06/2026 16:00 UTC
Service impact : The operating systems Ubuntu 25.04 and Fedora 42 are end-of-life.
Customers who have already installed one of these operating systems may continue to use it, but will no longer be able to reinstall it.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, starting from June 1st, customers will no longer be able to install end-of-life operating systems.
We encourage customers using these operating systems to migrate to supported versions such as Ubuntu 26.04 or Fedora 44, or a later version.

You can find the information at the following links:
https://github.com/ovh/public-cloud-roadmap/issues/1144
https://github.com/ovh/public-cloud-roadmap/issues/1158

Thank you for your understanding.
